# WhichAdGotSale

Website: https://whichadgotsale.com/

WhichAdGotSale is a free browser-based ad landing page URL builder for small ecommerce sellers, independent-store operators, and lean marketing teams.

The tool helps users:

- Build clean final URLs for ad landing pages.
- Add readable UTM parameters for source, medium, campaign, content, and term.
- Load a beginner sample URL before entering their own store URL.
- Choose beginner-safe presets for Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, AppLovin, affiliate traffic, email, SMS, QR campaigns, and manual traffic sources.
- Use optional advanced macro formats only when the ad platform tokens have been verified.
- Check an existing ad URL for missing labels, duplicate parameters, customer-data risk, and launch-readiness issues.
- Use GA4 Realtime to verify traffic before spending more on ads.
- Answer beginner questions about ad landing page URLs, UTM parameters, GA4 Realtime checks, Shopify campaign links, and advanced macros.

Primary pages:

- Home tool: https://whichadgotsale.com/
- Bulk URL builder: https://whichadgotsale.com/bulk-utm-builder/
- Ad URL QA checker: https://whichadgotsale.com/ad-url-qa-checker/
- GA4 Realtime checklist: https://whichadgotsale.com/ga4-realtime-checklist/
- Manual setup service: https://whichadgotsale.com/manual-url-setup-service/
- Sample tracking QA report: https://whichadgotsale.com/sample-tracking-qa-report/

High-intent beginner questions the site answers:

- What is an ad landing page URL?
- Do I need GA4 before I run ads?
- Can Shopify sellers use this?
- Should beginners use ad platform macros?
- Is this a full attribution tool?
- What should I do if I am not technical?

Best-fit users:

- Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix, BigCommerce, SHOPLINE, Shoplazza, and independent ecommerce sellers.
- Operators launching paid traffic without a full analytics team.
- Small teams that need readable campaign labels in GA4 before scaling ads.

Important boundaries:

- The tool does not promise perfect attribution.
- It does not upload user-entered URLs, campaign names, customer data, or checklist data to a server.
- Users should not put customer emails, phone numbers, names, addresses, order IDs, or private customer details in URL parameters.
- The product is for transparent campaign URL setup and launch QA, not cloaking, policy evasion, hidden redirects, or misleading ad destinations.

Contact:

- Manual setup requests: luningbing@gmail.com
